[tool: Bash(git add product/features/crt-033/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
pseudocode: crt-033 component design + test plans (#45) → [feature/crt-033 479b506] pseudocode: crt-033 component design + test plans (#453)
 16 files changed, 3029 insertions(+)

[Assistant] Committing Stage 3a artifacts, then Wave 1.
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: ADR-004 col-023: Wave-Based Refactor Plan for HookType Blast Radius
Sequential Module Migration Pattern: Re-Export Bridges for Large Crate Restructuring
Batch bugfix swarm procedure: parallel investigators + parallel architects + single rust-dev + single tester
Moving a pre-loop extraction block when inserting a new pipeline step in search.rs
Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
